info.name: Enterprise API Template
info.description: Enterprise-level API with optimized RBAC and response structure

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints with enterprise-level JWT and permission versioning

request.description:
Refresh token endpoint returns minimal response (no full user data).
Frontend should use cached user data and only update tokens.

**Response:**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "token": "new_jwt_token",
    "refresh_token": "new_refresh_token",
    "expires_in": 900,
    "refresh_in": 604800,
    "token_type": "Bearer",
    "permission_hash": "a1b2c3"
  }
}
```

Logout from current device or all devices.

**Request Body:**
- `refresh_token`: Current refresh token to revoke
- `all_devices`: Set to `true` to logout from all devices

item.name: Users
item.description: User management endpoints with coarse-grained permissions (user.read, user.write, user.manage)

request.description: Requires: `user.read` permission
Requires: `user.read` permission
Requires: `user.write` permission
Requires: `user.write` permission
Requires: `user.manage` permission
Requires: `user.read` permission

item.name: Roles
item.description: Role management with enterprise RBAC hierarchy

request.description: Requires: `role.read` permission
Requires: `role.read` permission

Requires: `role.write` permission

**Role Levels (lower = higher privilege):**
- 1: Super Admin
- 10: Admin
- 20: Manager
- 30: Specialist
- 50: Staff
- 100: Viewer
Requires: `role.write` permission

Requires: `role.manage` permission

**Note:** Protected roles (is_protected=true) cannot be deleted

Requires: `role.manage` permission

**Note:** This increments the role's permission_version, invalidating cached permissions
Validates current user's role and permission hash

Returns permissions with enterprise naming convention.

**Permission Format:** `module.action`

Examples:
- `user.read` - View users
- `user.write` - Create/edit users
- `user.manage` - Full user management
- `deal.approve` - Approve deals
- `report.export` - Export reports

Returns permissions grouped by module for UI rendering.

**Response:**
```json
{
  "user": ["read", "write", "manage"],
  "role": ["read", "write", "manage"],
  "deal": ["read", "write", "manage", "approve", "export"]
}
```

item.name: HRD - Attendance
item.description: HRD Attendance management endpoints including clock in/out, work schedules, holidays, and overtime

item.name: Attendance
item.description: Employee attendance tracking with GPS validation

request.description:
Get current day's attendance status for the authenticated user.

**Response:**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "has_checked_in": true,
    "has_checked_out": false,
    "attendance_record": {...},
    "work_schedule": {...},
    "is_working_day": true,
    "is_holiday": false,
    "current_server_time": "2024-01-15T08:30:00+07:00"
  }
}
```

Clock in with GPS coordinates. GPS is validated against work schedule office location.

**Check-In Types:**
- `NORMAL` - Regular office (GPS validated)
- `WFH` - Work from Home (no GPS validation)
- `FIELD_WORK` - Field work (GPS logged but not validated)

**Error Codes:**
- `ATTENDANCE_ALREADY_CLOCKED_IN` - Already clocked in today
- `ATTENDANCE_GPS_OUT_OF_RANGE` - Outside allowed GPS radius
- `ATTENDANCE_HOLIDAY` - Today is a holiday

Clock out with GPS coordinates. Auto-creates overtime request if working past schedule end time.

**Note:** If clock out time exceeds schedule end time by more than 30 minutes, an overtime request is automatically created with type `AUTO_DETECTED`.

Get monthly attendance statistics for the authenticated user.

**Response:**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "present_days": 20,
    "absent_days": 1,
    "late_days": 2,
    "leave_days": 1,
    "total_working_hours": "168h 30m",
    "total_overtime_hours": "12h 0m",
    "attendance_percentage": 95.5
  }
}
```

List attendance records with filters. Requires `attendance.read` permission.

**Filters:**
- `employee_id` - Filter by employee
- `status` - PRESENT, ABSENT, LATE, HALF_DAY, LEAVE, WFH, OFF_DAY, HOLIDAY
- `check_in_type` - NORMAL, WFH, FIELD_WORK
- `date_from`, `date_to` - Date range
- `is_late` - Filter late arrivals
Get attendance record by ID. Requires `attendance.read` permission.

body.raw:
{
  "employee_id": "{{employee_id}}",
  "date": "2024-01-15",
  "check_in_time": "08:00",
  "check_out_time": "17:00",
  "check_in_type": "NORMAL",
  "status": "PRESENT",
  "notes": "Manual entry for missed clock-in",
  "reason": "Employee forgot to clock in due to urgent meeting"
}

request.description:
Create manual attendance entry. Requires `attendance.create` permission.

**Use Cases:**
- Employee forgot to clock in
- System was down
- Correction of incorrect records
Update attendance record. Requires `attendance.update` permission.
Delete attendance record. Requires `attendance.delete` permission.

item.name: Work Schedules
item.description: Work schedule configuration with GPS and flexible hours

request.description: List work schedules. Requires `work_schedule.read` permission.
Get the default work schedule. Requires `work_schedule.read` permission.
Get work schedule by ID. Requires `work_schedule.read` permission.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Standard Office Hours",
  "description": "Regular 9-to-5 office schedule",
  "division_id": null,
  "is_default": true,
  "is_active": true,
  "start_time": "08:00",
  "end_time": "17:00",
  "is_flexible": false,
  "break_start_time": "12:00",
  "break_end_time": "13:00",
  "break_duration": 60,
  "working_days": 31,
  "working_hours_per_day": 8,
  "late_tolerance_minutes": 15,
  "early_leave_tolerance_minutes": 10,
  "require_gps": true,
  "gps_radius_meter": 100,
  "office_latitude": -6.2088,
  "office_longitude": 106.8456
}

request.description:
Create work schedule. Requires `work_schedule.create` permission.

**Working Days Bitmask:**
- Monday = 1
- Tuesday = 2
- Wednesday = 4
- Thursday = 8
- Friday = 16
- Saturday = 32
- Sunday = 64
- Mon-Fri = 31 (1+2+4+8+16)
Update work schedule. Requires `work_schedule.update` permission.
Delete work schedule. Requires `work_schedule.delete` permission.
Set work schedule as default. Requires `work_schedule.update` permission.

List holidays with filters. Requires `holiday.read` permission.

**Types:**
- `NATIONAL` - Government holidays
- `COLLECTIVE` - Cuti Bersama
- `COMPANY` - Company-specific
Check if a specific date is a holiday. Requires `holiday.read` permission.
Get all holidays for a specific year. Requires `holiday.read` permission.
Get holiday by ID. Requires `holiday.read` permission.

body.raw:
{
  "date": "2024-12-25",
  "name": "Christmas Day",
  "description": "National Christmas Holiday",
  "type": "NATIONAL",
  "is_collective_leave": false,
  "cuts_annual_leave": false,
  "is_recurring": true,
  "is_active": true
}

request.description: Create a holiday. Requires `holiday.create` permission.
Create multiple holidays at once. Requires `holiday.create` permission.
Update holiday. Requires `holiday.update` permission.
Delete holiday. Requires `holiday.delete` permission.

body.raw:
{
  "date": "2024-01-15",
  "start_time": "17:00",
  "end_time": "20:00",
  "reason": "Complete urgent client deliverable",
  "description": "Need to finish the quarterly report before deadline",
  "task_details": "1. Finalize report data\n2. Create presentation\n3. Send to client",
  "request_type": "MANUAL_CLAIM"
}

request.description:
Submit overtime request. No special permission required (self-service).

**Request Types:**
- `AUTO_DETECTED` - Created by system on clock out
- `MANUAL_CLAIM` - Employee manual request
- `PRE_APPROVED` - Pre-planned overtime

Get own monthly overtime summary. No special permission required.

**Response:**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "total_requested_minutes": 600,
    "total_approved_minutes": 480,
    "pending_requests": 2,
    "approved_requests": 8,
    "rejected_requests": 1
  }
}
```
Cancel own pending overtime request. Only works for requests with status `PENDING`.
Get pending overtime requests for approval. Requires `overtime.approve` permission.

Approve overtime request. Requires `overtime.approve` permission.

**Note:** Manager can adjust approved minutes if needed.
Reject overtime request with reason. Requires `overtime.approve` permission.

List all overtime requests with filters. Requires `overtime.read` permission.

**Status Filter:**
- `PENDING` - Awaiting approval
- `APPROVED` - Approved by manager
- `REJECTED` - Rejected
- `CANCELED` - Canceled by employee
Get overtime request by ID. Requires `overtime.read` permission.
Update overtime request. Requires `overtime.update` permission.
Delete overtime request. Requires `overtime.delete` permission.

Get pending overtime notifications for polling. Requires `overtime.approve` permission.

Used by frontend to show notification badge for pending approvals.
